name: Cucumber Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 24 slices whole wheat bread, crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange cucumber slices on a plate.
2. Sprinkle vinegar and salt over the cucumber slices. Let the mixture stand for 30 minutes.
3. Drain the cucumbers and pat them dry with paper towels.
4. Lightly spread butter on one side of each bread slice.
5. Overlap the cucumber slices in two layers atop 12 bread slices.
6. Sprinkle green onion over the cucumber layers.
7. Season with freshly ground white pepper.
8. Top each layer with a slice of buttered bread, buttered side down.
9. Cut the sandwiches into rounds using a 1½-inch round cookie cutter.
